name: add-bug
tagline: Adds a new bug entry to Remotion's bugs API array file from a user-described bug and affected versions.
verdict: Small, precise, low-risk skill: explicit code template, default changelog link, and a clear top-of-array ordering rule leave nothing to guess. Only gap is the missing version/changelog signal; otherwise a clean, narrow, well-scoped skill with no security or actionability concerns.

highlights.summary: No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
